creator: elvstone@gmail.com
text:
Hello Edwin.

I'm really sorry I've been in the middle of selling my buissness (book
caf=E9) and I've been really busy.

I approve of the patch, commit away!

The new owner of the caf=E9 takes over in little over a week, after
which I'll have much more time to be alert when it comes to updating
my ports.

Aron

2008/5/6 Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org>:
> Maintainer of irc/znc,
>
>  Please note that PR ports/123448 has just been submitted.
>
>  If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
>  you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
>  and a committer will take care of it.
>
>  The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/123448
>
>  --
>  Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
>  edwin@FreeBSD.org
>
